content.claim: Poland's 2022 PISA assessment occurred after the first post-reversal cohort (those who had completed 8 years of primary school under the 8+4 structure and were in Grade 9 of the re-stratified system) sat the exam, meaning comprehensive trend data on the reversal's long-run effects only became available starting 2022
content.context: Fresh live research through the Polish system reform lens
limitations: Establishes a data availability constraint rather than an empirical finding about outcomes
Post-2022 PISA results would be needed to assess whether reversal produced the performance changes claimed by its proponents or critics
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
